historical_accuracy.notable: Stocks outperformed strongly on T+1: NOW +3.6%, PANW +2.1%, CRM +1.8%, V +0.9%, GILD +0.2%, AMGN +0.1%. XAG and XAU flat (counted as holds). Crypto underperformed: BTC -1.8%, ETH -1.7%, SOL -3.1%. LLY slight miss at -1.2%. SNOW and PLTR unconfirmed. Pattern: equity compounders outperformed crypto in risk-off environment.

macro_context.hormuz_status: 2-week ceasefire in progress; US-Iran talks ongoing

picks.name: Visa
picks.thesis: 53.2% FCF margin, PEG 1.71, earnings in 13 days with 4-beat streak, Tempo stablecoin validator positioning Visa at digital dollar infrastructure core.

picks.name: Mastercard
picks.thesis: FCF 49.6%, PEG 1.64, 4-beat streak, earnings +15d. Higher cross-border growth (+17.6% YoY) than Visa. Near-identical quality compounder at fair valuation.

picks.name: Meta Platforms
picks.thesis: Cheapest mega-cap tech on PEG basis (0.88) with +23.8% revenue growth. Broadcom AI chip deal through 2029. Snap cuts redirect ad budgets to Meta. Earnings +14d.

picks.name: Ethereum
picks.thesis: Best risk/reward in crypto: 53% below ATH, 4 consecutive ETF inflow days, Aave V4 mainnet catalyst, ETH/BTC bouncing from 2026 lows signaling altcoin rotation.

picks.name: Qualcomm
picks.thesis: Deepest value in universe: PEG 0.57, fwd PE 12.01. Edge AI pivot (Bosch ADAS, Snap AR) priced as zero-growth company. 4-beat streak, earnings +14d.

picks.name: Eli Lilly
picks.thesis: Best PEG/growth ratio in large-cap pharma: PEG 1.00 on +42.6% revenue growth. Foundayo oral GLP-1 FDA approval expands TAM massively. CrossBridge Bio ADC oncology pipeline. Earnings +15d.

picks.name: Silver Spot
picks.thesis: Gold/silver ratio 60.7x vs 50x historical mean — reversion implies $96+ silver. Silver 20% below pre-conflict peak vs gold only 10% below. Solar/EV industrial demand provides structural floor.
risk_flags: Hormuz ceasefire could ease precious metals

picks.name: ConocoPhillips
picks.thesis: RSI 32.2 oversold vs WTI at $91/bbl (breakeven ~$40). Goldman Sachs top oil pick for Q2. FCF 12.4% supports buybacks. Earnings +15d with 3-beat streak.

picks.name: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals
picks.thesis: Stealth setup: PEG 1.61, FCF 22.7%, 3-beat streak, earnings +14d, under-followed. Dupixent expanding into COPD adds $5B+ addressable market on a $16B+ franchise.

picks.name: Amgen
picks.thesis: Defensive anchor: FCF 20.4%, 3%+ dividend yield, 4-beat streak, RSI 46.2. MariTide obesity drug is a free call option on the GLP-1 market not in consensus estimates.

picks.name: ASML Holding
picks.thesis: EUV monopoly with no competitive substitute. Q1 beat-and-raise but Q2 guide miss caused -5% flush today — DCA entry opportunity. FCF 33.2%, full-year 2026 guidance raised on AI demand.

picks.name: Occidental Petroleum
picks.thesis: RSI 31.1 deeply oversold with Berkshire Hathaway credibility floor. Revenue +149% (CrownRock integration). 4-beat streak, earnings +20d. DCA given Hormuz binary risk and post-acquisition debt.

picks.name: Bitcoin
picks.thesis: 46-day negative funding streak (contrarian bullish signal). Goldman Sachs ETF filing, Pakistan banks unlock, Strategy 780K BTC. DCA given RSI 69.4 approaching overbought and ETH showing stronger near-term momentum.

picks.name: Gold Spot
picks.thesis: Gold overbought post-rally (+48% YTD). Ceasefire diplomacy near-term headwind. Better entry at $4,550-4,660 (R/R 2.3x). Silver is the better precious metals play at current prices.

cross_sector_insights.insight: Payments duopoly (V + MA) offer the best risk-adjusted returns with earnings catalysts in 13-15 days.
cross_sector_insights.implication: Anchor ~17% of portfolio in V + MA for compounding with near-term catalyst.

cross_sector_insights.insight: Silver (XAG) is the highest-conviction commodity trade: gold/silver ratio at 60.7x vs 50x historical mean.
cross_sector_insights.implication: Precious metals allocation should favor XAG over XAU at current relative valuations.

cross_sector_insights.insight: Crypto: ETH shows stronger short-term momentum than BTC (ETH/BTC ratio turning, 4-day ETF inflows).
cross_sector_insights.implication: Full ETH buy; DCA BTC given RSI 69.4 approaching overbought.

cross_sector_insights.insight: Energy stocks (COP, OXY) are deeply oversold at RSI 31-32 while WTI holds $91 — double the breakeven.
cross_sector_insights.implication: Accumulate energy in two tranches; watch Hormuz ceasefire outcome before committing full weight.

executive_summary: April 15, 2026 — Moderate profile: 14 picks (10 buy, 3 DCA, 1 wait). Market regime MIXED with Fear & Greed at 23 (Extreme Fear) while S&P 500 holds near 6,972. Top conviction: V (payments moat, 53% FCF, earnings +13d), ETH (best crypto R/R on 4-day ETF inflows), QCOM (PEG 0.57 edge-AI mispricing), LLY (PEG 1.00 on +42.6% growth + Foundayo approval), XAG (gold/silver ratio 60.7x vs 50x mean = highest commodity R/R). Historical accuracy: 66.7% win rate (8/12 confirmed from April 14). ASML flush -5% today creates DCA opportunity. Gold overbought — wait for $4,550-4,660 entry.

macro_environment.summary: VIX 17.53, Fear & Greed 23 (Extreme Fear), MIXED regime. S&P 500 ~6,972. Hormuz 2-week ceasefire in progress; WTI at $91 down from $113 spike. Fed Funds 3.75%, ~30% cut probability 2026. BTC 46-day negative funding streak (contrarian bullish). ASML Q1 beat-and-raise but Q2 guide miss. Mega-cap earnings season begins in 13-22 days.
